"'''Spy Girls'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] from ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 7]]''. It features [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], [[Sheltay Retrac/Legends|Sheltay Retrac]], [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Gregar Typho]], [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. Pencils and inks are by [[Stewart McKenny]].

==Plot summary==
[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]], [[Sheltay Retrac/Legends|Sheltay Retrac]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] walk into an elegant gala hosted by [[Bezz Drexx]], who Organa suspects of accepting [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] bribes. Separating from the rest of the group (much to Typho's chagrin), Amidala and Retrac begin to mingle, hoping to gain more information into the matter. Noticing that Drexx is being pulled over by Separatist leader [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente's]] [[Passel Argente's uncle|uncle]], Amidala and Retrac follow, ignoring C-3PO's plight at the hands of an overzealous [[Droid/Legends|droid]] lover. Climbing up the stairs, the two women dispose of their dresses to reveal bodysuits, prepared for action.

Disposing of several guards using various means, the two reach [[Bezz Drexx's tower|Drexx's tower]]. They must split up when they find a split end, and Amidala ends up finding Drexx, about to accept a case of gold from Argente's uncle. Amidala's camera is spotted by the pair, who promptly send their guards after her. Tricking the burly men with her weak, feminine appearance, Amidala escapes into a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] piloted by Retrac. Back in Organa's apartment, they are pleased to find that the incriminating video can be used to punish Drexx for his betrayal. It's only when C-3PO is credited for his help that a look of horror pass their faces: the droid has been left to suffer with the droid lover from the previous night.

==Continuity==
*This story was originally intended to be an Anakin/Padmé adventure, with a plot similar to [[Wikipedia:Mr. & Mrs. Smith|''Mr. & Mrs. Smith'']], where the protagonists accept assignments (from Palpatine and Bail respectively) that bring them into conflict with one another, though they would be costumed and each wouldn't know the other was involved.
*The final story was originally set to be located on Bezz Drexx's homeworld.
